metadata.title: About Immonation
metadata.description: Learn how Immonation GmbH supports owners and buyers in Zirndorf, Nuremberg, Fürth, and Erlangen.

AboutPage.title: Real-estate advisory with local roots and digital reach.
AboutPage.lede: Immonation supports owners, buyers, and investors in Zirndorf, Nuremberg, Fürth, Erlangen, and the surrounding region with valuation, marketing, and personal advisory.
AboutPage.body: Our standard is a transparent process with defensible numbers, clear communication, and marketing that does more than place a standard listing.

items.title: Local market knowledge
items.text: We value properties in the context of current demand, comparable transactions, and regional micro-locations.

items.title: Active marketing
items.text: Video, 360-degree tours, qualified buyer demand, and clear exposés help both sides make better decisions.

items.title: Personal guidance
items.text: One dedicated contact guides you from the first conversation to the notary appointment.

cta.title: Planning to sell or buy?
cta.text: Start with a grounded first assessment and a clear view of the next steps.
cta.label: Contact us

metadata.title: Contact
metadata.description: Contact Immonation GmbH for property valuation, sales advisory, buyer advisory, and search requests.

ContactPage.title: Let us talk about your property.
ContactPage.lede: Whether you are selling, valuing, buying, or creating a search request: send us a message or call us. We will respond with a concrete view of the next steps.

items.title: Initial context
items.text: We clarify location, property type, and objective so the first conversation is immediately useful.

items.title: Review the data
items.text: If helpful, we review documents, comparable values, and current demand in your region.

items.title: Define next steps
items.text: You receive a clear recommendation on whether valuation, marketing, or a search request is the right starting point.

metadata.title: Free property valuation
metadata.description: Free, non-binding property valuation for Zirndorf, Nuremberg, Fürth, Erlangen, and the surrounding region — well-founded, on site, with a written result.

hero.title: What is your property worth?
hero.lede: A well-founded valuation based on current sales data from your neighborhood — verified on site, documented in writing, and with no obligation.

ValuationPage.answer: The Immonation GmbH property valuation is free and non-binding. We determine the realistic market value of your property in Zirndorf, Nuremberg, Fürth, Erlangen, and the surrounding region — based on current transactions, our own brokered sales, and an on-site assessment, not an algorithm alone.

items.title: Current comparables
items.text: We value in the context of real sales from your area — not generic online calculators.

items.title: On-site assessment
items.text: Condition, fittings, and micro-location are personally verified and factored into the value.

items.title: Written result
items.text: You receive a documented assessment you can use for decisions, inheritance matters, or bank meetings.

items.title: No obligation
items.text: Whether you sell, hold, or seek a second opinion — the decision stays yours.

items.title: Share key details
items.text: Property type, location, and basic data — online in a few minutes or by phone.

items.title: Analysis & on-site visit
items.text: We review comparables and visit your property in person.

items.title: Result & recommendation
items.text: You receive the valuation in writing — with a clear recommendation for next steps.

items.question: What does the property valuation cost?
items.answer: For prospective sellers, the valuation is free and non-binding. Formal appraisals for inheritance or tax purposes are billed transparently by effort.

items.question: How long does the valuation take?
items.answer: From inquiry to written result typically takes a few days to two weeks, depending on scheduling and documents.

items.question: Which documents are needed?
items.answer: A floor plan, living-space calculation, energy certificate, and land-register extract help. Missing documents can be obtained together.

items.question: Am I obligated to anything after the valuation?
items.answer: No. The valuation is a basis for your decision — whether and when you sell is entirely up to you.

cta.title: Start your free valuation now
cta.text: Requested in 3 minutes — we respond within one business day with the next steps.

metadata.title: Frequently asked questions (FAQ)
metadata.description: Answers to the most common questions about selling, valuation, commission, timelines, and process at Immonation GmbH.

FaqPage.title: Common questions, clearly answered
FaqPage.lede: Costs, timelines, process, documents: the questions owners and buyers ask us most — answered in a few sentences.

items.question: What does the property valuation cost?
items.answer: The valuation is free and non-binding for prospective sellers — including an on-site assessment and a written result.

items.question: How long does a property sale take?
items.answer: Typically 6 to 12 weeks from marketing to the notary appointment — depending on the property, pricing strategy, and demand.

items.question: Who pays the broker commission?
items.answer: The commission is split between seller and buyer depending on the property and constellation. The exact rate is disclosed transparently in the exposé and before engagement.

items.question: Which documents do I need to sell?
items.answer: Land-register extract, floor plan, living-space calculation, energy certificate, and for apartments the declaration of division. We obtain missing documents together.

items.question: What does the 360° tour add?
items.answer: Prospects view digitally first — only serious buyers show up in person. That saves appointments and protects your privacy.

items.question: Which region does Immonation serve?
items.answer: We broker properties in Zirndorf, Nuremberg, Fürth, Erlangen, and within roughly 60 km of our office in Zirndorf.

items.question: Can I sell a rented property?
items.answer: Yes. We market tenanted properties specifically to investors — including preparation of the relevant rent and yield data.

items.question: Does Immonation also help with financing?
items.answer: Yes. Together with our financing partner Dr. Klein, we verify buyers' financing and advise buyers on conditions.

cta.title: Didn't find your question?
cta.text: Call us or start with a free valuation — we respond within one business day.

metadata.title: Privacy policy
metadata.description: Privacy policy of Immonation GmbH: controller, data processing, cookies, consent, and your rights.

LegalPrivacy.title: Privacy policy
LegalPrivacy.lede: How we handle your data — transparent and to the point. The German version is authoritative.

sections.heading: Controller
paragraphs: The controller for data processing on this website is Immonation GmbH, Nürnberger Straße 18, 90513 Zirndorf, Germany, phone +49 911 212 838 90, email info@immonations.de.

sections.heading: Hosting
paragraphs: This website is hosted by an external service provider. Personal data collected on this website is stored on the host's servers. [Host and data-processing agreement to be added before launch]

sections.heading: Contact & forms
paragraphs: If you contact us via form, email, or phone, we process your details to handle the inquiry (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR). We use an email service provider for form delivery. [Resend details and DPA to be added before launch]

sections.heading: Cookies & consent
paragraphs: We only use technically non-essential cookies and tracking services (e.g., Google Analytics 4, Meta Pixel) with your explicit consent via the consent banner (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR). You can withdraw your consent at any time.

sections.heading: External content
paragraphs: YouTube videos load in privacy-enhanced mode and only after a click. Links to Google, Trustpilot, Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook lead to external providers with their own privacy policies.

sections.heading: Your rights
paragraphs: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, and objection (Art. 15–21 GDPR). You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority, the Bavarian State Office for Data Protection Supervision.

LegalPrivacy.note: This privacy policy is a structured starting point and will be legally reviewed and completed before launch.

metadata.title: Terms and conditions
metadata.description: General terms and conditions of Immonation GmbH for brokerage services.

LegalTerms.title: Terms and conditions
LegalTerms.lede: The basis of our brokerage services. The German version is authoritative.

sections.heading: § 1 Scope
paragraphs: These general terms and conditions apply to all brokerage services of Immonation GmbH toward consumers and businesses. [Full text to be adopted from immonationgmbh.de and reviewed before launch]

sections.heading: § 2 Brokerage services
paragraphs: The subject of the activity is evidencing the opportunity to conclude a contract, or brokering a contract, concerning real estate. [Details to be added before launch]

sections.heading: § 3 Commission
paragraphs: The commission claim, its amount, and the split between the parties are disclosed transparently before engagement. [Specific rates to be added before launch]

sections.heading: § 4 Liability
paragraphs: The broker assumes no guarantee for the accuracy of property information provided by the owner. [Liability clauses to be legally reviewed before launch]

sections.heading: § 5 Final provisions
paragraphs: The law of the Federal Republic of Germany applies. Should individual provisions be invalid, the validity of the remaining provisions remains unaffected.

LegalTerms.note: These terms are a structured placeholder and will be replaced with the reviewed version before launch.

metadata.title: Careers at Immonation
metadata.description: Careers at Immonation GmbH in Zirndorf: employment in real estate and back office, or an independent sales partnership with 20% commission.

CareersPage.title: Working at Immonation
CareersPage.lede: Whether employed or as an independent sales partner: we are growing in the Nuremberg metropolitan region and looking for people who love real estate and sales.

sections.heading: Employees
paragraphs: We regularly fill positions in real estate and back office — from property onboarding to marketing and management. Specific job postings will be published here shortly.

sections.heading: Independent sales partners
paragraphs: You focus on acquisition and sales — Immonation handles administration, branding, paperwork, and the complete marketing structure. With 20 percent commission and an experienced team behind you.
Ideal for sales-driven people from the region with real-estate experience or their own buying and selling experience.

CareersPage.note: Detailed job postings and the full partner model are coming. Until then: reach out directly — we look forward to talking.

cta.title: Interested?
cta.text: Tell us briefly who you are and what you're looking for — we respond within one business day.

metadata.title: Become a referrer
metadata.description: Benefit as an Immonation GmbH referrer: recommend owners ready to sell and share in the successful closing.

ReferrersPage.title: Recommend and benefit
ReferrersPage.lede: You know someone who wants to sell a property? As a referrer, you share in the successful closing — with no effort of your own.

sections.heading: How it works
paragraphs: You give us a contact with intent to sell. We handle consultation, valuation, and marketing. If the sale closes successfully, you receive a referrer fee.
Discretion is a given: your contact only learns the recommendation came from you with your consent.

ReferrersPage.note: The details of the referrer model (fee amount, conditions) are currently being finalized and will be published here.

cta.title: Have a tip for us?
cta.text: A short message is enough — we'll discuss everything else personally.

seller.title: Your property sale, actively managed — not just listed.

buyer.title: Find your home before everyone else sees it.
buyer.subtitle: Current listings from Zirndorf, Nuremberg, Fürth, and Erlangen — with search requests, financing advice, and personal support until you move in.

intro.title: Real-estate advisory with local market knowledge and digital marketing strength.
intro.p1: Immonation GmbH guides property owners in Zirndorf, Nuremberg, Fürth, Erlangen, and within a 60 km radius through the entire selling process — from a well-founded valuation to professional marketing to the notary appointment.
intro.p2: Personal, transparent, and with proven results: dedicated contacts, an active network of pre-qualified buyers, and marketing with video, 360° tours, and social media.

steps.title: Onboarding call
steps.text: A free first call by phone or video: we clarify your goals, the timeline, and answer your initial questions.

steps.title: On-site appointment
steps.text: A personal viewing of your property and a market-based valuation — on site, not by algorithm alone.

steps.title: Pricing & sales strategy
steps.text: A realistic asking price, target-group definition, and a clear marketing plan before the property goes online.

steps.title: Property shoot
steps.text: Professional photos, a video exposé, and a 360° tour present your property in the best possible light.

steps.title: Marketing
steps.text: High-reach marketing across portals, our network, and social media — for maximum qualified demand.

steps.title: Buyer qualification & financing
steps.text: We vet prospects including proof of financing — only serious, solvent buyers come to viewings.

steps.title: Notary & closing
steps.text: Negotiation management, the notary appointment, and support all the way to the key handover — all from one hand.

virtualTour.title: The virtual viewing: convince buyers before anyone is on site
virtualTour.p1: Every property gets a professional 360° tour. Prospects view your property digitally first — realistically, anytime, from anywhere. Only people who genuinely want to buy show up in person.

bullets.title: Fewer on-site viewings
bullets.text: The undecided filter themselves out digitally — you open your door only for serious prospects.

bullets.title: Data-based pre-qualification
bullets.text: How often and how long a tour is viewed reveals genuine buying interest — before an appointment is made.

bullets.title: Protected privacy
bullets.text: Tours are shared exclusively with vetted prospects; sensitive areas are obscured.

bullets.title: Realistic presentation
bullets.text: Honest spatial impressions instead of embellished images — including virtual home staging where it makes sense.

virtualTour.demoNote: An interactive demo will appear here

items.quote: “From valuation to the notary appointment, everything went faster than expected — and we were kept informed at all times.”
“The 360° tour spared us many unnecessary viewings. Only serious prospects came.”
“Professional, always reachable, and honest about pricing. Clear recommendation.”
